subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having shown unto Thy loved ones the surging waves of the ocean of Thy utterance and the effulgent rays of the Daystar of Thy bounty, and for having sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما اریت اولیائک امواج بحر بیانک و تجلیات نیر جودک و انزلت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
